original.description: The original default recommended parameter set on the AIND ephys pipeline repo.

no+motion_v0.description: The first attempt to disable motion correction from being applied during processing.

no+motion_v1.description: A revision of `name-no+motion_revision-0.json` which disables motion correction native to the spike sorters. Also clamps the seeds similarly to `name-determinstic.json`.

deterministic.description: Same as the `name-original.json`, but all `seed` entries are clamped to `0` instead of `null` or some other value.

all+channels.description: Same as the `name-deterministic.json`, but all parameters are set to include any detected 'bad channels' and not exclude any channels at any step of the pipeline.

no+motion.description: The current recommendations for running without any motion correction.

custom+preprocessing+default.description: A new default params file added in pipeline v1.2.2.

default.description: The current recommended default parameter set.
